title: Brand Identity Design
description: Complete brand identity package for a tech startup including logo, color palette, and marketing materials.
summary: Complete brand identity package for a tech startup including logo, color palette, and marketing materials.

title: ReBranding AI Generated Logos
description: AI can generate an image, but it can’t build a brand. This project shows how I took generic AI outputs and turned them into original, vibe-heavy identities.
summary: AI can generate an image, but it can’t build a brand. This project shows how I took generic AI outputs and turned them into original, vibe-heavy identities.

title: SpectrumPoint — Neurodivergent Profiling Platform
description: An interactive web application that visualizes neurodivergent trait patterns across a three-axis model inspired by ASD, ADHD, and OCD frameworks.
summary: An interactive web application that visualizes neurodivergent trait patterns across a three-axis model inspired by ASD, ADHD, and OCD frameworks.

title: Community Discord Bot
description: Custom Discord bot built for my LGBT+ server to support moderation, automate routine tasks, and help maintain a safer, more welcoming space for queer, trans, and non binary members.
summary: Custom Discord bot built for my LGBT+ server to support moderation, automate routine tasks, and help maintain a safer, more welcoming space for queer, trans, and non binary members.

title: Designing Pride: Honouring the Icons Who Built Our Future
description: A retro-inspired Pride Month poster series celebrating two pivotal LGBTQ+ icons through bold typography, stylised portrait illustration, and expressive colour storytelling.
summary: A retro-inspired Pride Month poster series celebrating two pivotal LGBTQ+ icons through bold typography, stylised portrait illustration, and expressive colour storytelling.

title: Dual Mind Digital Portfolio
description: I designed and built a dual-mode digital portfolio split into Creative and Tech, using a toggle to switch views and filter content. The project reflects how I balance artistic design and technical problem solving while focusing on clarity, user experience, and interactive front end logic.
summary: I designed and built a dual-mode digital portfolio split into Creative and Tech, using a toggle to switch views and filter content. The project reflects how I balance artistic design and technical problem solving while focusing on clarity, user experience, and interactive front end logic.

title: Family Keys Illustration
description: This piece was created as a personal gift for a family member, with each illustrated key representing an individual person within the family. Every key was designed with unique symbols, shapes, and details to reflect that person’s personality, energy, and role within the family.
summary: This piece was created as a personal gift for a family member, with each illustrated key representing an individual person within the family. Every key was designed with unique symbols, shapes, and details to reflect that person’s personality, energy, and role within the family.

title: Outcast – Unity Game Prototype
description: A Unity game test run showcasing core gameplay functionality and character animation for an original concept inspired by superpowered survival narratives.
summary: A Unity game test run showcasing core gameplay functionality and character animation for an original concept inspired by superpowered survival narratives.

title: Pong Recreation – First HTML Game
description: A recreated version of the classic Pong game built during my BTEC ICT course using HTML, CSS, and basic programming logic.
summary: A recreated version of the classic Pong game built during my BTEC ICT course using HTML, CSS, and basic programming logic.
